name: Axify
description: Software engineering intelligence platform with value-stream mapping, DORA metrics and AI-powered delivery forecasting.

seo.title: Axify — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Axify: Software engineering intelligence platform with value-stream mapping, DORA metrics and AI-powered delivery forecasting.

when_to_use: Value-stream mapping to identify delivery bottlenecks
DORA metrics dashboard for engineering leadership
AI-powered delivery forecasting for sprint planning
Track lead time and deployment frequency over quarters

pros: DORA metrics plus value-stream mapping in one view
AI-powered delivery forecasting for release planning
Pulls from Jira, GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps
Cheaper than Jellyfish or LinearB at similar scope
cons: Smaller vendor with less proven enterprise track record
Forecasts depend heavily on ticket hygiene
Community and integration ecosystem still growing
review.verdict: Credible engineering intelligence at SMB-friendly pricing, but lacks the polish of Jellyfish or LinearB.
review.best_for: Mid-market engineering leaders wanting DORA plus forecasting without enterprise sticker shock.
review.not_for: Large enterprises needing deep integrations and dedicated CSM support.
